name: Pilot Travel Center #4562
description: 24-hour Pilot travel center in the NW quadrant of I-95 Exit 1 with diesel lanes, 8 showers, about 111 truck parking spaces, a CAT scale and Dunkin.

name: Pilot Travel Center #575
description: Large 24-hour Pilot at I-95 Exit 1 (St Marys Rd) with 14 fuel lanes, 12 showers, about 235 parking spaces and a CAT scale.

name: Petro Stopping Center #344 (TA/Petro Kingsland)
description: 24-hour Petro (TravelCenters of America) at I-95 Exit 3 with 9 fuel lanes, 5 showers, about 136 parking spaces, a CAT scale, a 5-bay TA Truck Service and Popeyes.

name: Georgia Welcome Center (I-95 Northbound)
description: GDOT welcome center on northbound I-95 about a mile north of the Florida line near Kingsland/St Marys, with separate truck and car parking lanes, restrooms and picnic tables.

name: Coastal Chevron / Sunshine Travel Plaza
description: 24-hour independent Chevron truck stop at I-95 Exit 14 with 24-hour diesel, about 100 truck parking spaces, laundry, a restaurant and Wi-Fi.

name: Love's Travel Stop #405
description: 24-hour Love's at I-95 Exit 29 (US-17) with diesel, about 78 truck parking spaces, 6 showers, a CAT scale, truck/tire care and Subway/Chester's/Godfather's.

name: Flying J Travel Center #627
description: 24-hour Flying J at I-95 Exit 29 with 12 diesel lanes, 15 showers, about 150 parking spaces, a CAT scale, Denny's, laundry and propane.

name: TA Travel Center Brunswick
description: TravelCenters of America travel center at I-95 Exit 29 (US-17) with 8 diesel lanes, about 107 truck parking spaces, showers and Subway/Burger King/Starbucks.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Brunswick
description: 24/7 double-bay Blue Beacon truck wash at I-95 Exit 29 next to the Love's, with truck/trailer exterior wash, washouts, engine wash, aluminum brightening and RV wash.

name: Love's Speedco #906
description: Speedco truck lube and tire center at I-95 Exit 29 with an expanded tire selection, light mechanical, oil/lube (PM) service and roadside assistance; Michelin dealer.

name: Dynamic Diesel Solutions
description: 24-hour mobile and on-site heavy-duty service near I-95 Exit 29 with truck, trailer, tire, reefer and RV repair, diagnostics, hydraulics, suspension and trailer washout.

name: El Cheapo #54 (Texaco)
description: 24-hour independent El Cheapo (Texaco) truck stop at I-95 Exit 49 (GA-251) just south of the DOT scales, with 5 diesel pumps, about 25 truck parking spaces, a deli/restaurant and laundry.

name: GA DPS Weigh Station (I-95 Northbound, Townsend)
description: Georgia DPS Commercial Vehicle Enforcement weigh/inspection station on northbound I-95 near mile marker 55 in McIntosh County (between Darien Exit 49 and Townsend Exit 58).

name: GA DPS Weigh Station (I-95 Southbound, Townsend)
description: Georgia DPS Commercial Vehicle Enforcement weigh/inspection station on southbound I-95 near mile marker 56 in McIntosh County (near Townsend/Darien).

name: GA I-95 Glynn County Rest Area (Southbound)
description: GDOT rest area on southbound I-95 near mile marker 38 in Glynn County (Brunswick area) with separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms, water, picnic tables and RV dump.

name: El Cheapo #50
description: 24-hour independent El Cheapo truck stop at I-95 Exit 76 (Midway/Riceboro) with Shell-branded fuel, truck diesel with satellite pumps, showers, a deli/fast food and Wi-Fi.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Kingsland (#4562)
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #4562 at I-95 Exit 1 in Kingsland.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot St. Marys (#575)
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #575 at I-95 Exit 1 (St Marys Rd).

name: CAT Scale at Petro Kingsland (#344)
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Petro Stopping Center (TA/Petro) at I-95 Exit 3 in Kingsland.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Brunswick (#405)
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #405 at I-95 Exit 29 in Brunswick.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Brunswick (#627)
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Flying J Travel Center #627 at I-95 Exit 29 in Brunswick.
